name: Lineuparr
description: Mirror real-world provider channel lineups by creating channel groups, channels, and fuzzy-matching IPTV streams to them.
author: PiratesIRC

options.label: Relaxed — more matches, more false positives

fields.label: ♻ Preserve Existing Streams
fields.help_text: When on, newly matched streams are appended to channels without deleting existing streams, duplicates are skipped, and unmatched channels are not deleted. Use this to add a second M3U source non-destructively.

fields.label: ⌖ Single Channel Match
fields.help_text: When set, Preview Stream Match, Apply Stream Match, Apply EPG Match, and Assign Logos operate ONLY on the lineup channel(s) whose name equals this value (case-insensitive). Leave blank to process the whole lineup. Full Sync ignores this setting.

actions.label: Validate Settings
actions.description: Check all settings, show lineup summary and available profiles

actions.label: Preview Stream Match
actions.description: Dry-run: show stream-to-channel matches with confidence scores (CSV export)

actions.label: Full Sync
actions.description: Create groups and channels from lineup, fuzzy-match streams, assign EPG, assign logos, enable in profiles, and clean up unmatched channels

confirm.message: This will create groups, channels, match streams, assign EPG data, assign logos, enable channels in profiles, and remove unmatched channels. Continue?

actions.label: Sync Channels Only
actions.description: Create/update groups and channels from lineup (no stream matching)

confirm.message: This will create groups and channels from the lineup. Continue?

actions.label: Apply Stream Match Only
actions.description: Attach matched streams to existing channels with quality ordering

confirm.message: This will attach matched streams to channels and remove unmatched channels. Continue?

actions.label: Apply EPG Match
actions.description: Fuzzy-match EPG data to channels and assign program guides

confirm.message: This will assign EPG data to Lineuparr-managed channels. Continue?

actions.label: Assign Logos
actions.description: Auto-assign channel logos from EPG icons, Logo Manager, or tv-logos GitHub repo

confirm.message: This will assign logos to channels that don't have one. Continue?

actions.label: Re-sort Streams by Quality
actions.description: Re-order already-attached streams using latest quality data. Run this after IPTV Checker scans your streams to use actual resolution/bitrate instead of name-based quality detection.

actions.label: Clear CSV Exports
actions.description: Delete all Lineuparr CSV export files
